description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle featuring a long, cylindrical barrel and a robust receiver, likely constructed from metal alloys for durability and precision. The rifle is equipped with a collapsible stock, allowing for adjustable length to suit different users or operational needs. A bipod is mounted near the front of the rifle, providing stability for accurate long-range shooting, and a Picatinny rail runs along the top of the receiver for mounting optics or accessories. The magazine appears to be a detachable box type, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. The overall finish is matte black, giving the rifle a sleek, non-reflective appearance suitable for urban or tactical environments. The design is streamlined, with ergonomic features such as a pistol grip and a contoured stock for comfortable handling.
description: A modern, matte black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, bipod, and detachable box magazine, designed for precision and stability. Features a long barrel, Picatinny rail, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical barrel, bipod legs, and narrow profile.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the collapsible stock, long barrel, bipod, and Picatinny rail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock, pistol grip, and bipod legs splayed outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the stock and barrel.
